name: Sprott Focus Trust, Inc.
description: Sprott Focus Trust, Inc. is a closed-end equity mutual fund launched and managed by Sprott Asset Management LP and Sprott Asset Management USA Inc. The fund invests in public equity markets, focusing on value-oriented common stocks of companies across various sectors. It primarily targets companies with strong balance sheets, high returns on invested capital, and potential for long-term capital appreciation. The fund was formerly known as Royce Focus Trust, Inc. and is domiciled in the United States.
